feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Intercompany credit memo
entry.content:
Hi ,

Intercompany credit memo is not working even CR to IG copy control is maintained with routing 013.

When trying to create the intercompany billing IG system is showing "full quantity invoice".  When I am selecting IG manually while creating the Billing document then system is allowing to create IG document but in this case sales area and payer got copied from credit memo request but here payer and should should be different.

All the required settings is maintained in system.

Please suggest your valuable inputs.

entry.title: somebody tech me these...
entry.content:
account management
D-01 How do Use by changing the end of the basic log, etc. ?
D-02 How do Use after removing unnecessary accounts from the database or setting a lock.?
D-03 How do Set special use period and council diagram to suit the institution's needs?
D-04 How do To deny database administrator privileges, you must grant privileges to accounts and groups.?
D-12 How do Set password reuse restrictions?
D-13 How do DB user accounts were individually granted.?
access management
D-05 How do Restriction of access to DB server from remote location?
D-06 How do Prevent unauthorized users other than DBA from accessing system tables?
D-07 How do In case of Oracle database, set the listener password and use it.?
D-14 How do Use by removing unnecessary ODBC/OLE-DB data sources and drives?
D-15 How do Setting a lockout policy for a certain number of login failures?
D-16 How do Set the UMASK of the DB account to 022 or higher to protect key files in the database.?
D-17 How do Access rights to key files such as key configuration files and password files in the database are set appropriately.?
D-18 How do Restrict changes to the listener log and trace files by accessing the Oracle listener by users other than the administrator.?
option management
D-08 How do Adjust the Role of the application or DBA account so that it is not set to Public.?
D-09 How do Set OS_ROLES, REMOTE_OS_AUTHENTICATION, REMOTE_OS_ROLES to FALSE?
D-19 How do Password confirmation function is set and applied?
D-20 How do Existence of unauthorized Object Owner?
D-21 How do Restrictions on unauthorized use of GRANT OPTION?
D-22 How do Set the resource limit feature of the database to TRUE?
patch management
D-10 How do Apply all latest security patches and vendor recommendations to your database?
D-11 How do Set audit records such as database access, change, and deletion to suit the organization's audit record policy.?
D-23 How do Use a non-secure version of the database?

entry.title: Using the BAPI_CREATE_SHIPMENT
entry.content:
Hi,

I was trying to see if the data I entered in the different structures for the BAPI were ok (not very easy to find where data should be entered, as the data in the different structures don't have the same name as in VTTK, VTTP, VTSP tables).

But though I get a success message telling me that a shipment was created, I can't find any shipment with the number in the message.

Am I missing anything?

Thanks for the help

Kind regards

Yan

entry.title: BADI to update partner profit center while creating journal Entries
entry.content:
I have a requirement in SAP Public cloud where while creating journal entry via creating incoming invoice, the input Partner Profit center should get copied form line item 002 to line item 001.

The BADI FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION does not work because line item 001 gets created before 002.

Please help me with the same

entry.title: Hi Please help me with error. G/L account 4000 cannot be used (please correct)Message no. ME045
entry.content:
G/L account 4000 cannot be used (please correct)

Message no. ME045

Diagnosis

Comparison of the field selection strings from the G/L account 4000 and the account assignment category K reveals that there is an incompatible combination of field selections for the field selection group 'Cost center'.

The G/L account field selection is stored in table T004F; that for the account assignment is stored in table T162K.

Procedure

Please enter a correct G/L account.

entry.title: What port is used when I perform import in HANA DB?
entry.content:
Hi fellows, I am asking our security department to open firewall for my HANA transport. In my installation I have following import scenarios: 1. import table into HANA 2. import DU into HANA 3. import CV in development mode In these scenarios, which port is required to perform the import action? Is it enough to open the SQL port of my HANA installation? Thank you~~ 

SAP HANA, platform edition

#Native HANA transport

entry.title: System view not showing data in Container
entry.content:
Hello, 
When we are trying to access the system view (for example, _SYS_TASK. START_TASK_MESSAGES) as a synonym in the container project, it executes without any error but shows no data. 

Same view when accessed from the database SQL console using db user, it shows the data.

Is there any workaround we have to do to make this data visible from container?

Steps to replicate the issue. 

  1. Create a synonym on top of SYS_TASK.START_TASK_MESSAGES. 
  2. Do data preview on the synonym using the container sql console(RT user).  [Data will be not visible]
  3. Do SELECT * FROM _SYS_TASK.START_MESSAGES using your DB user [You will see the data].

System views which are having same issues are as follows.

  1.     SYS.M_TASKS
  2.     SYS.M_TABLE_STATISTICS
  3.     _SYS_TASK.START_TASK_MESSAGES
  4.     SYS. USER_PARAMETERS

Does anyone faced the same issue? Is there any workaround for this?

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,

Ajinkya Jadhav

entry.title: error
Activation Error - Calculation View by Table User Defined Function
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to use a User defined table function in HANA Calculation view and i am getting the below Activation error message, I tried making all the source fields to upper case but still getting the same error. Appreciate any inputs.

 

Thanks,

Rajesh

entry.title: Crear una busqueda formateada ligada a otra busqueda formateada
entry.content:
Buenas tardes.

En el modulo de factura de deudores se facturan servicios , se creo una busqueda formateada para seleccionar el servicio a facturar con un código de clasificacion 

Ahora que ya tengo el codigo, necesito la descripcion pero esta es diferente al que esta en el codigo de clasificacion se creo una tabla con las descripciones nuevas 

Necesito crear una query para asignar a la busqueda formateada en el campo descripcion de tal manera que cuando selecciones el codigo de clasificacion me ponga la descripcion  personalizada en el campo descripcion.    Saludos

entry.title: Is there any possibility to convert a Hana Graphical Calculation view to SAP DataSphere view?
entry.content:
I have a new mission that is figure out a way to convert Hana Graphical view to SAP DataSphere view.

I did not find any doc or even comment about this procedure, so does any one had issue like this or have heard something that can help me. 

 

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Active/Active Read enabled option
entry.content:
Dear Team,

our requirement is, customer was using s4hana, they want to connect the secondary system in SAP using read access mode, we have enabled the logreplay_readaccess mode in secondary system, but when we are trying to login it shows license error, i want to know which license is required to login into secondary system, i have found below SAP note, please give me some solution for this requirement.

please go through the link regarding the Active/Active Read enabled option

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/4e9b18c116aa42fc84c7dbfd02111aba/6c47a595535e494f94567b209fbf8579.html

2685661 - Licensing required for HANA System Replication

in the license Management what they have mentioned is below

The SAP HANA Active/Active read-enabled option requires additional licensing (see also the Feature Scope Description for SAP HANA); the license for Active/Active (read enabled) also covers the multi-target replication scenario. Active/Active is enabled by setting the system replication operation mode to logreplay_readaccess, the secondary system is then operated automatically with the license key of the primary system. Changes to the license key are done on the primary system and replicated to the secondary system (see also Managing SAP HANA Licenses).

Thanks,

+91-9553836498

entry.title: Consume Level Based Hierarchy from HANA View in WEBI
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have created a Level based Hierarchy in HANA Calculation View ( HANA 2.0) . I am able to consume that Hierarchy in Analysis for Office.

My Question here is I am trying to consume the same Hierarchy in WEBI (BOBJ 4.2 SP9 Patch 1), I can not consume the Hierarchy with the levels.

Can someone please share if you face this issue and resolution.

 

Thanks,

Sriram

entry.title: Last Used Date for a Procedure in SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I have some Procedures defined in a HANA schema and would like to know whether they are used or not.

Can someone help me with the system tables/views I have to use in order to find whether and when a Procedure was last executed.

Regards,

Dimitar

entry.title: SKU: 8017496 (SAP HANA, EE Cloud, upgrade, private edition)
entry.content:
Hello experts, do you know what is the purpose for this SKU: 8017496 (SAP HANA, EE Cloud, upgrade, private edition.)

In the  UnofficialPAM the description is a License, and the customer has a BOM with this SKU: do you have some examples? the BOM only includes this SKU (related to HANA EE)

8017496SAP HANA, EE Cloud, upgrade, private editionUpsellLicenseGeneric Private CloudUpgrades HANA use rights of S/4HANA Enterprise Management. Please note that customer may require Data Provisioning Agent in most cases (already included with S/4HANA EM and installed on-demand basis).
XSA is included on request only.

and yet this SKU mentions that the DP agent is included by default.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Business One licensing schema
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a question about SAP Business One version for HANA in virtualization environment, If I intends to utilize VMware SRM for Disaster Recovery Center (DRC) scenario, will there be any impact on their hardware key if I activate the secondary server? Will it change or the secondary server will using the same hardware key? In my experience, in SQL version the hardware key still the same, but how about in HANA version?

Thank you,

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Query Regarding Lift-and-Shift Process for RISE Migration
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are planning to execute a lift-and-shift migration and have the following queries related to the process:

1. HANA System Replication to RISE 

   We are looking to perform a lift-and-shift migration from our on-premises environment to RISE with SAP. Could you please confirm if it is feasible to use SAP HANA System Replication for this migration? If so, could you provide any specific guidelines or prerequisites for setting up HANA system replication between the on-premises system and RISE?

2. Backup During Lift-and-Shift

   In the context of lift-and-shift migration, we would like to understand how data backups should be handled during the migration process. Specifically:

   - How should the data backup be transferred to the migration server?

   - Will the migration mount point on the migration server need to be added to the on-premises server for this transfer, or is there a different recommended approach for ensuring proper backup handling during the migration?

We appreciate your assistance and look forward to your guidance on these topics.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: A Nota Técnica 2021.001 (Evento Comprovante de Entrega da NF-e)
entry.content:
Ola,

 

Alguém conhece alguma empresa que implementou o controle de canhoto conforme: A Nota Técnica 2021.001 (Evento Comprovante de Entrega da NF-e).

entry.title: XS Job Scheduler Dashboard Using REST API Authentication
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

Following the blog I was able to create the XS Jobs using the scheduler.createJob function, similarly was able to use other functions as well.

I have scheduled a procedure with action as thisAppURI + "/js/hana/execute?hdbprocedure=" + jobActionProcedure.

Now, I am getting "Unauthorised" error when the job is executed. I am using XSUAA for authentication. I also gave username and password in job configuration which has access to execute the procedure but no luck. My guess is to add some API authorisation to that user but cannot find any documents related to that

In this blog, there is some mention to grant using SAP_JWT_TRUST_ACL but it is not ver clear on what has to be done.

Thank You.
Best Regards,

Ajinkya Jadhav

entry.title: Why is S/4HANA suddenly unable to log in? HANA has also encountered this before
entry.content: S/4HANA suddenly unable to log in, prompted with incorrect name or password. Hana has experienced this before, may I ask why it happened? How can I reset my password？
